creator: dcb314@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)
>is this still a problem on recent versions of FreeBSD?

No idea, and I won't be finding out.
I notice this one has taken nearly ten years to be replied to.

If projects don't answer their bug reports promptly, I tend
to not bother contributing anymore.

Gcc is usually within 24 hours, clang a couple of days.

Have fun !
